message:
test(types): add comprehensive value pool slab allocator test suite

Exercises the ValuePoolStats telemetry infrastructure added in the
previous commit with end-to-end tests covering the full pool lifecycle.

- Add ValuePoolTestGuard RAII helper that clears pool and resets stats
  on construction and drop, ensuring test isolation
- Add test_slab_basic_alloc_dealloc: verifies acquire-from-empty returns
  None with global_alloc_fallback_count=1, return increments pool length
  and slab_return_count, subsequent acquire returns pooled value with
  slab_alloc_count=1
- Add test_slab_exhaustion_fallback: fills pool to VALUE_POOL_CAP+1,
  verifies cap is enforced and excess values are dropped, then drains
  pool verifying slab_alloc_count matches pool capacity
- Add test_slab_lifo_ordering: returns Integer(1), Integer(2), Integer(3)
  and verifies LIFO pop order (3, 2, 1)
- Add test_slab_high_water_mark_tracking: verifies high_water_mark
  increases monotonically through return/acquire cycles and correctly
  captures the peak pool size
- Add test_slab_stats_accumulate_across_multiple_cycles: runs 3 full
  return-then-acquire cycles and asserts cumulative counters match
  expected totals (slab_alloc_count=3, slab_return_count=3)
- Add test_slab_mixed_value_types: exercises pool with all SqliteValue
  variants (Null, Integer, Float, Text, Blob) verifying type-preserving
  round-trip through the pool

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
